title: Symbiodinium / Aiptasia Cell Population Crude Lysis for PCR Template
author: Anthony Bellantuono
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.k2bcyan

steps.title: Pellet 500 μl of dense culture...
steps.instruction: Pellet 500 μl of dense culture or one small Aiptasia anemone in a microcentrifuge tube by centrifuging at 10,000 rcf for 1 minute. Discard supernatant.

steps.title: Resuspend pellet in 200 μl TE (10 mM Tris, 0
steps.instruction: Resuspend pellet in 200 μl TE (10 mM Tris, 0.1mM EDTA, pH 8.0).

steps.title: Heat for 10 minutes in an...
steps.instruction: Heat for 10 minutes in an Eppendorf Thermomixer at 95°C with agitation (700 rpm). Alternatively, boil for 10 minutes.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 10,000 rcf for 1 minute
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 10,000 rcf for 1 minute. Place on ice.

steps.title: The supernatant can be used as-is...
steps.instruction: The supernatant can be used as-is for PCR template with robust polymerase mixes. Typical use is 1 μl of supernatant in a 25-50 μl reaction.
